title: Metals rally pauses as market reassess fundamentals
section_path: Metals rally pauses as market reassess fundamentals
section_path_text: Metals rally pauses as market reassess fundamentals
summary:
Main
A rally across metals cooled amid fears they had run ahead of fundamentals. More hawkish Fed speakers also weighed on sentiment. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-22 102919.png | assets/2024-05-22_metals-rally-pauses-as-market-reassess-fundamentals_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_08c16e14060d.png
Market Commentary
Gold edged lower amid more hawkish commentary from Federal Reserve officials.
